allow: Bash(sed -i 's|aria-label="${isFav?'\\''Retirer des favoris'\\'':'\\''Ajouter aux favoris'\\''}" aria-pressed="${isFav}"|aria-label="${isFav?'\\''Retirer des favoris'\\'':'\\''Ajouter aux favoris'\\''}" title="${isFav?'\\''Retirer des favoris'\\'':'\\''Ajouter aux favoris'\\''}" data-tip="${isFav?'\\''Retirer ♥'\\'':'\\''Ajouter aux favoris'\\''}" aria-pressed="${isFav}"|g' js/ui.js)

Bash(sed -i 's|aria-label="${inCart?'\\''Retirer des courses'\\'':'\\''Ajouter aux courses'\\''}" aria-pressed="${inCart}"|aria-label="${inCart?'\\''Retirer des courses'\\'':'\\''Ajouter aux courses'\\''}" title="${inCart?'\\''Retirer des courses'\\'':'\\''Ajouter aux courses'\\''}" data-tip="${inCart?'\\''Retirer 🛒'\\'':'\\''Ajouter aux courses'\\''}" aria-pressed="${inCart}"|g' js/ui.js)
